name: Thin Mint Cookie Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box (14 oz) Thin Mint cookies, crushed into 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until fluffy.
2. Add the egg yolks one at a time.
3. Mix in the cocoa and 1 cup of Thin Mint cookie crumbs.
4. Gradually add the flour and mix until just combined.
5. Whip the egg whites until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch pan and bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
8. Allow to cool in the pan with parchment paper for 15 minutes, then remove from the pan.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
10. Top the cake with melted chocolate and heavy cream mixture (melted chocolate combined with heavy cream).
11. Sprinkle with 1 cup of Thin Mint cookie crumbs.
12. Dust with powdered sugar.
(Note: This recipe is not suitable for those concerned about dietary restrictions or cholesterol.)
